subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is and others, spoken on 1912-10-31
subcodes.first_line: This Cause has spread all over the world... Behold the creative power of Baha'u'llah!... This is the third time that I am in Chicago.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این امر در آفاق منتشر شده و بین ملل و احزاب صلح داده نفوس مختلفه
subcodes.subjects: @many are called but few are chosen, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @unity of governments; political unity, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible
